subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz believes he was once weak and vows never to be so again.
source_quote: I was weak once, never again.

subject: The party
fact: The party understood the Githyanki to be ancient enemies of mind flayers, arrogant, warlike, and deeply hostile to anyone they deemed beneath them.
source_quote: Drawing on their knowledge of Githyanki lore, the party understood these creatures to be ancient enemies of mind flayers — arrogant, warlike, and deeply hostile to anyone they deemed beneath them, which was essentially everyone.

subject: The party
fact: The party realized that Arrizz would not survive much longer in the Githyanki's custody.
source_quote: It was clear that Arrizz would not survive much longer in their custody.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein felt a surge of adrenaline during the battle.
source_quote: Daein, fueled by a surge of adrenaline, unleashed a flurry of additional attacks

subject: The Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight realized the tide had turned decisively against his forces and chose to escape.
source_quote: When the tide turned decisively against them, the Githyanki Knight made his choice — he cast a powerful planar spell and vanished entirely from the material world

subject: The party
fact: The party recognized that the Githyanki Knight had made them a permanent enemy.
source_quote: leaving behind only the echo of a threat that the party had made a permanent enemy.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz experienced demonic madness that made his words erratic and paranoid.
source_quote: The demonic madness that had been seeping through the Underdark had taken hold of him, and his words were erratic and paranoid.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz decided that the surface world was not for him because it was too bright, too full of people smiling when they weren't happy, and far too hard on his eyes.
source_quote: He explained, with characteristic dry wit, that after their last adventure together he had decided the surface world was simply not for him — too bright, too full of people smiling when they weren't happy, and far too hard on his eyes.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz wanted to leave but agreed to travel with the party for a time on the condition that they owed him a beer.
source_quote: Arrizz agreed to wait nearby and travel with the party for a time before going his own way, on the condition that they owed him a beer.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz refused to eat brains when the party discussed harvesting Githyanki brains as keys.

subject: The party
fact: The party's instincts told them something was off about Thera's story of being an innocent traveler.
source_quote: but the party's instincts told them something was off.

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera refused to say more about her employers because she feared what they would do to her if she talked.
source_quote: She refused to say more about her employers, citing a very reasonable fear of what they would do to her if she talked.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim failed completely to pick up on anything about the Githyanki situation during his insight check.
source_quote: Bramgrim rolls a natural 2 on his insight check to read the room, completely failing to pick up on anything about the Githyanki situation.

subject: The party
fact: The party was shocked by the emergence of the Intellect Devourer from the Githyanki warrior's skull.
source_quote: only for something horrifying to happen. From the fallen warrior's skull, a grotesque creature emerged: a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs, an Intellect Devourer that had been lurking inside the Githyanki all along.

subject: The remaining Githyanki warrior
fact: The remaining Githyanki warrior saw that the battle was lost and chose to flee.
source_quote: The remaining Githyanki warrior, seeing the battle lost, used a burst of magical teleportation to slip beyond the party's reach.
